prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: db_24624 Product Type: SURVIVAL_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Camper Water Bottle Survival Kit Description: There are a lot of survival kits on the market and they are mixed with every variety of survival gear; some are useful and some are useless.

This kit is for anyone who enjoys a good camp-out, and is stuffed with the essentials you need for a comfortable camping or backpacking trip.

We have included some crucial quality items such as a 5 in 1 multi tool (flint, striker, whistle, window punch and compass) and a camping utensil tool. We've also added in a poncho, hand warmers, a glow stick, kevlar, bandages and compressed towels.

Great for camping, hiking, boating, & adventures.

PLEASE NOTE: colors and contents may vary.

Package Includes:
-(1) 34oz Water Bottle
-(1) Utensil Tool
-(10) Cable Zip Ties
-(4) Compressed Towels
-(2) Hand Warmers
-(1) Orange Poncho
-(1) 5 in 1 Compact Survival Tool
-(5) Bandages
-(1) Glow Stick Search Terms: survival whistle Features: - 34oz BPA Free Water Bottle - 5 in 1 Multi Tool (Flint, Striker, Whistle, Compass & Window Punch) - Kevlar Cord - 200lbs Breaking Strength - Compressed Towels - Just Add Water! - Emergency Orange Poncho === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Camper Water Bottle Survival Kit

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor Camper Water Bottle Survival Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 34Oz Water Bottle, 5 In 1 Multi Tool, Emergency Poncho, Whistle, Compass, Kevlar Cord, Hand Warmers

openai.title_differentiation: 34Oz BPA Free Water Bottle, 5 In 1 Multi Tool, Kevlar Cord, Compressed Towels, Hand Warmers, Emergency Poncho
